title: Custom Damage Particles
description: Stripped version of ToroHealth Damage Indicators for 1.7.10
body:
This is a stripped version of "ToroHealth Damage Indicators" for 1.7.10 that contains only the damage particles.

 

It also has the feature of only showing the particles when you see the mob, you can disable this by setting "show always particles" to true.

![particle_config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5ec09de441aa16ec454a36790b058a2698bccb8.webp)

Official 1.8.9+ ToroHealth Damage Indicators links Curseforge - Github
